query_text: (@P0 varchar(8000),@P1 varchar(8000))update rt1_0 set status=@P0 from revert_transaction rt1_0 where rt1_0.transaction_id=@P1

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_eod_settlement_update_ticket(    -- Input Parameter    @bizdate             DATE   ,@system_id        TINYINT    -- Output Parameters   ,@return_msg NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)WITH EXECUTE AS OWNERASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    DECLARE            @now         DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@now_offset  DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset()          ,@record_no         INT          ,@no_of_batch       INT = 10000          ,@return_code       INT = 0          ,@retry_count       INT = 10          ,@retry             INT          ,@row_num        BIGINT = 0;    --common variable    DECLARE            @ticket_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_batch;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_batch;    --cancelled ticket    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_cancelled;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_cancelled;    --cashout    DECLARE            @cashout_normal_setted_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_settled_bet;    ----single    DECLARE            @cashout_single_ticket_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_ticket;    DECLARE            @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    ----allup    DECLARE            @cashout_allup_ticket_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_ticket;    --normal ticket    DECLARE            @allup_pool_ids dbo.udt_settlement_pool_ids;    DECLARE            @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids dbo.udt_settlement_tournament_allup_pool_event_ids;    DECLARE            @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_allup_pool_combination_result;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_single_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_losing_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_winning_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    --cashout diff    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_pool_ids dbo.udt_settlement_pool_ids;    DECLARE            @cashout_ticket_diff_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_batch;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_pool_combination_result_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_allup_pool_combination_result;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_single_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_losing_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_winning_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    SET @retry = @retry_count;    WHILE @retry > 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRY            IF @retry != @retry_count            BEGIN                --clear data to reuse table variables                --common variable                DELETE FROM @ticket_batch_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                 --cancelled ticket                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp;                --cashout                DELETE FROM @cashout_normal_setted_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_single_ticket_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_allup_ticket_tmp;                --DELETE FROM @cashout_allup_bet_financial_tmp;                --normal ticket                DELETE FROM @allup_pool_ids;                DELETE FROM @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids;                DELETE FROM @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_single_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_losing_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_winning_financial_tmp;                 --cashout diff                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_pool_ids;                DELETE FROM @cashout_ticket_diff_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_pool_combination_result_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_single_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_losing_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_winning_tmp;            END;            -- if input bizdate is null, retrieve the last EOD business date            IF @bizdate IS NULL            BEGIN                SELECT @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate();            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @bizdate <> dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate()                BEGIN                    SELECT @return_code = 50021                          ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';                    THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;                END;            END;            IF NOT EXISTS            (                SELECT 1                FROM   dbo.business_day                WHERE  bizdate = @bizdate            )            BEGIN                SELECT @return_code = 50021                      ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';                THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;            END;            IF @system_id IS NULL            BEGIN                SELECT @return_code = 50000                      ,@return_msg = 'SystemId cannot be NULL';                THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;            END;            IF EXISTS            (                SELECT 1                FROM   dbo.business_day                WHERE  bizdate = @bizdate AND settlement_at IS NOT NULL            )            BEGIN                RETURN;--support rerun            END;            -- settle single cancel ticket bets            INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id)            SELECT a.system_id                  ,a.ticket_id                  ,a.bet_id            FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single a WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_id            WHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND (s.is_cancel = 1 OR s.is_reverse = 1);            --            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) system_id                                         ,ticket_id                                         ,bet_id                FROM                      @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp                WHERE                     row_num > @row_num                ORDER BY row_num;                SELECT @record_no = @@rowcount;                --delete unsettled_ticket_bet_single                DELETE a                FROM dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single a                     INNER JOIN @ticket_bet_batch_tmp b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id;                COMMIT TRANSACTION;                IF @record_no = 0                BEGIN                    BREAK;                END;                SET @row_num+=@no_of_batch;            END;            -- Settle allup cancel ticket bets            INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id)            SELECT a.system_id                  ,a.ticket_id                  ,a.bet_id            FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup a WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_id            WHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND (s.is_cancel = 1 OR s.is_reverse = 1);             --            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) system_id                                         ,ticket_id                                         ,bet_id                FROM                      @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp                WHERE                     row_num > @row_num                ORDER BY row_num;                SELECT @record_no = @@rowcount;                --delete unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination                DELETE a                FROM dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination a                     INNER JOIN @ticket_bet_batch_tmp b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id;                 --delete unsettled_ticket_bet_allup                DELETE a                FROM dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup a                     INNER JOIN @ticket_bet_batch_tmp b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id;                COMMIT TRANSACTION;                IF @record_no = 0                BEGIN                    BREAK;                END;                SET @row_num+=@no_of_batch;            END;            --retrieve allup info             INSERT INTO @allup_pool_ids                   (pool_id)            SELECT DISTINCT                    pool_id            FROM   unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination WITH(NOLOCK)            WHERE  system_id = @system_id;            --retrieve allup result             INSERT INTO @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp                   (pool_id                   ,line_id                   ,combination_id                   ,result_id                   ,pay_factor_1                   ,pay_factor_2                   ,is_payout_refund)            SELECT r.pool_id                  ,r.line_id                  ,r.combination_id                  ,r.result_id                  ,r.pay_factor_1                  ,r.pay_factor_2                  ,r.is_payout_refund            FROM   dbo.pools p WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK)                   INNER JOIN @allup_pool_ids p1 ON p.pool_id = p1.pool_id                   INNER JOIN dbo.pool_combination_result r WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK) ON p1.pool_id = r.pool_id            WHERE  p.settle_bizdate <= @bizdate AND p.is_deleted = 0;            -- retrieve tournament pool event id for aggregate_daily_tournament_allup_turnover(GPW,GPF)            INSERT INTO @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id                   ,event_id)            SELECT DISTINCT                    utbac.system_id                  ,utbac.ticket_id                  ,utbac.bet_id                  ,p1.event_id            FROM   unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination utbac WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN @allup_pool_ids p ON utbac.pool_id = p.pool_id                   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p1 ON p.pool_id = p1.pool_id AND p1.is_deleted = 0            WHERE  utbac.system_id = @system_id AND p1.event_type = 1; --tournament            -- cashout settled info            INSERT INTO @cashout_normal_setted_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,normal_dividend                   ,normal_profit_loss                   ,normal_investment                   ,normal_refund                   ,num_setted_bet)            SELECT f.system_id                  ,f.ticket_id                  ,SUM(f.dividend) AS    normal_dividend                  ,SUM(f.profit_loss) AS normal_profit_loss                  ,SUM(f.investment) AS  normal_investment                  ,SUM(f.refund) AS      normal_refund                  ,COUNT(1) AS           num_setted_bet            FROM   dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket cashout WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.ticket_bet_financial f WITH(NOLOCK) ON f.system_id = cashout.system_id AND f.ticket_id = cashout.ticket_id            WHERE  cashout.system_id = @system_id AND cashout.cashout_bizdate = @bizdate            GROUP BY f.system_id                    ,f.ticket_id;            -- single cashout ticket            INSERT INTO @cashout_single_ticket_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,unit_bet                   ,total_investment                   ,num_bet                   ,num_normal_bet                   ,num_cashout_bet                    --,race_no                   ,account_no                   ,sports_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,event_type                   ,bet_type                   ,allup_level                   ,account_category                   ,channel_device_type                   ,channel_report_type                   ,cashout_amount                   ,cashout_dividend                   ,cashout_profit_loss                   ,cashout_investment                   ,normal_dividend                   ,normal_profit_loss                   ,normal_investment                   ,normal_refund_investment                   ,already_payout_amount_ap                   ,already_payout_amount_diff                   ,is_allup_ticket                   ,ticket_allup_level                   ,ticket_allup_type                   ,ticket_sell_request_id                    --for FO1309,FO1310                   ,is_inplay_bet                   ,channel_type                   ,centre_no                   ,window_no                   ,ticket_request_at                   ,ticket_eos_start_at                   ,ticket_eos                   ,accept_category                   ,is_inplay_cashout                   ,cashout_datetime                   ,cashout_eos_start_at                   ,cashout_eos                   ,event_id                   ,parent_event_id                   ,pool_id                   ,is_aggregated)            SELECT    cashout.system_id                     ,cashout.ticket_id                     ,t.unit_bet                     ,t.total_investment                     ,t.num_bet                     ,ISNULL(normal_settled.num_setted_bet,0)                     ,t.num_bet-ISNULL(normal_settled.num_setted_bet,0)                      --,t.race_no                     ,single.account_no                     ,t.sports_id                     ,t.sell_bizdate                     ,t.event_type                     ,single.bet_type                     ,t.allup_level                     ,single.account_category                     ,t.channel_device_type                     ,t.channel_report_type                     ,cashout.cashout_amount+ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0) --cashout_amount=cashout amount+the same day pool payout that early than ES                      ,cashout.cashout_amount+ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0) --cashout_dividend=cashout_amount                     ,cashout.cashout_amount+ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)-(t.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0))                     ,t.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)                     ,normal_settled.normal_dividend                     ,normal_settled.normal_profit_loss                     ,normal_settled.normal_investment                     ,normal_settled.normal_refund                     ,cashout.already_payout_amount                     ,ISNULL(cashout.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)                     ,t.is_allup                     ,t.allup_level                     ,t.allup_type                     ,t.sell_request_id                      --for FO1309,FO1310                     ,single.is_inplay_bet                     ,sr.channel_type                     ,sr.centre_no                     ,sr.window_no                     ,sr.request_at                     ,IIF(c.start_at IS NOT NULL,DATEADD(ss,-c.base_second,c.start_at),NULL) AS                                                       ticket_eos_start_at                     ,ticket_eos.ticket_eos                     ,t.counter_offer_type AS                                                                                                         accept_category                     ,IIF(cashout.is_inplay = 1 OR cashout_event_clock.start_at IS NOT NULL,1,0) AS                                                   is_inplay_cashout -- if the event clock with cashout EOS is not null, means at least the match entered inplay when the moment ES is done                     ,cashout.cashout_datetime AS                                                                                                     cashout_datetime                     ,IIF(cashout_event_clock.start_at IS NOT NULL,DATEADD(ss,-cashout_event_clock.base_second,cashout_event_clock.start_at),NULL) AS cashout_eos_start_at                     ,cashout_eos.event_operation_status AS                                                                                           cashout_eos                     ,single.event_id                     ,single.parent_event_id                     ,single.pool_id                     ,IIF(t.num_bet-ISNULL(normal_settled.num_setted_bet,0) = 1,1,0)            FROM      dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket cashout WITH(NOLOCK)                      INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket t WITH(NOLOCK) ON cashout.system_id = t.system_id AND cashout.ticket_id = t.ticket_id AND t.is_allup = 0 --single ticket                      INNER JOIN dbo.sell_request sr WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK) ON t.system_id = sr.system_id AND t.sell_request_id = sr.sell_request_id AND t.ticket_id = sr.ticket_id                      OUTER APPLY            (                SELECT TOP 1 leg.event_operation_status AS ticket_eos                FROM         dbo.sell_request_leg AS leg WITH (NOLOCK,FORCESEEK)                WHERE        sr.system_id = leg.system_id AND sr.sell_request_id = leg.sell_request_id AND sr.sell_bizdate_year_system = leg.sell_bizdate_year_system            ) ticket_eos                      OUTER APPLY            (                --multiple selection                SELECT TOP 1 single.bet_type                            ,single.account_category                            ,single.account_no                            ,single.is_inplay AS is_inplay_bet                            ,p.pool_id                            ,p.event_id                            ,p.parent_event_id                FROM         dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single single WITH(NOLOCK)                             INNER JOIN dbo.pools p WITH(NOLOCK) ON single.pool_id = p.pool_id                WHERE        single.system_id = t.system_id AND single.ticket_id = t.ticket_id            ) single                      LEFT JOIN dbo.event_clock c WITH(NOLOCK) ON c.event_id = single.event_id AND c.event_operation_status = ticket_eos.ticket_eos AND c.is_started = 1                      OUTER APPLY            (                SELECT TOP 1 cashout_eos.event_operation_status                FROM         dbo.event_level2_eos_change cashout_eos WITH(NOLOCK)                WHERE        cashout_eos.event_id = single.event_id AND cashout_eos.effective_at <= cashout.cashout_datetime                ORDER BY effective_at DESC            ) cashout_eos                      OUTER APPLY            (                SELECT TOP 1 cashout_event_clock.start_at                            ,cashout_event_clock.base_second                FROM         dbo.event_clock cashout_event_clock WITH(NOLOCK)                WHERE        cashout_event_clock.event_id = single.event_id AND cashout_event_clock.event_operation_status = cashout_eos.event_operation_status AND cashout_event_clock.is_started = 1                ORDER BY cashout_event_clock.start_at DESC            ) cashout_event_clock                      LEFT JOIN @cashout_normal_setted_tmp normal_settled ON normal_settled.system_id = cashout.system_id AND normal_settled.ticket_id = cashout.ticket_id            WHERE cashout.system_id = @system_id AND cashout.cashout_bizdate = @bizdate;            -- single cashout ticket - single selection            INSERT INTO @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id                   ,pay_odds                   ,unit_bet                   ,investment                   ,refund                   ,refund_pool                   ,refund_selection                   ,refund_selective                   ,dividend                   ,profit_loss                   ,bet_value_score                   ,race_no                   ,account_no                   ,sports_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,event_type                   ,bet_type                   ,allup_level                   ,single_bet_pool_id                   ,single_bet_line_id                   ,single_bet_combination_id                   ,pool_event_id                   ,tag_event_id                   ,is_allup                   ,is_inplay                   ,account_category                   ,channel_device_type                   ,channel_report_type                   ,is_on_course                   ,is_allup_ticket   --ticket level                   ,ticket_allup_level--ticket level                   ,ticket_allup_type --ticket level            )            SELECT single.system_id--system_id                  ,single.ticket_id--  ,ticket_id                  ,utbs.bet_id--  ,bet_id                  ,single.cashout_dividend/utbs.unit_bet--  ,pay_odds                  ,utbs.unit_bet--  ,unit_bet                  ,utbs.unit_bet--  ,investment                  ,0--  ,refund                  ,0--  ,refund_pool                  ,0--  ,refund_selection                  ,0--  ,refund_selective                  ,single.cashout_dividend--  ,dividend                  ,single.cashout_dividend-utbs.unit_bet--  ,profit_loss                  ,NULL--  ,bet_value_score                  ,utbs.race_no                  ,utbs.account_no                  ,single.sports_id                  ,single.sell_bizdate                  ,single.event_type                  ,single.bet_type                  ,NULL                  ,utbs.pool_id                  ,utbs.line_id                  ,utbs.combination_id                  ,p.event_id                  ,utbs.event_id --tag event id                  ,0                  ,CASE                       WHEN utbs.sports_id = 1 THEN dbo.udf_is_inplay_for_hr                                                    (utbs.pool_id,utbs.race_no)                       ELSE utbs.is_inplay                   END AS is_inplay                  ,utbs.account_category                  ,single.channel_device_type                  ,single.channel_report_type                  ,utbs.is_on_course                  ,single.is_allup_ticket   --ticket level                   ,single.ticket_allup_level--ticket level                  ,single.ticket_allup_type --ticket level            FROM   @cashout_single_ticket_tmp single                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single utbs WITH(NOLOCK) ON single.system_id = utbs.system_id AND single.ticket_id = utbs.ticket_id                   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p WITH(NOLOCK) ON p.pool_id = utbs.pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0            WHERE  single.is_aggregated = 1;-- single:only one bet has no settled            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @cashout_single_ticket_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_batch_tmp;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                --cashout_ticket_financial                INSERT INTO dbo.cashout_ticket_financial                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_sell_request_id                       ,is_allup                       ,unit_bet                       ,total_investment                       ,num_bet                       ,num_normal_bet                       ,num_cashout_bet                        --,race_no                       ,account_no                       ,sports_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,event_type                       ,bet_type                       ,allup_level                       ,account_category                       ,channel_device_type                       ,channel_report_type                       ,settle_bizdate                       ,cashout_amount                       ,cashout_dividend                       ,cashout_profit_loss                       ,cashout_investment                       ,normal_dividend                       ,normal_profit_loss                       ,normal_investment                       ,normal_refund_investment                       ,already_payout_amount_ap                       ,already_payout_amount_diff                        --for FO1309,FO1310                       ,is_inplay_bet                       ,channel_type                       ,centre_no                       ,window_no                       ,ticket_request_at                       ,ticket_eos_start_at                       ,ticket_eos                       ,accept_category                       ,is_inplay_cashout                       ,cashout_datetime                       ,cashout_eos_start_at                       ,cashout_eos                       ,event_id                       ,parent_event_id                       ,pool_id                       ,is_aggregated                       ,create_at                       ,update_at)                OUTPUT inserted.system_id                      ,inserted.ticket_id                       INTO @ticket_batch_tmp(system_id                                             ,ticket_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) t.system_id                                         ,t.ticket_id                                         ,t.ticket_sell_request_id                                         ,0--t.is_allup                                                         ,t.unit_bet                                         ,t.total_investment                                         ,t.num_bet                                         ,t.num_normal_bet                                         ,t.num_cashout_bet                                          --,t.race_no                                         ,t.account_no                                         ,t.sports_id                                         ,t.sell_bizdate                                         ,t.event_type                                         ,t.bet_type                                         ,t.allup_level                                         ,t.account_category                                         ,t.channel_device_type                                         ,t.channel_report_type                                         ,@bizdate --t.settle_bizdate                                                   ,t.cashout_amount         --cashout_amount                                          ,t.cashout_dividend       --cashout_dividend                                          ,t.cashout_profit_loss  --cashout_profit_loss                                         ,t.cashout_investment--cashout_investment                                         ,t.normal_dividend                                         ,t.normal_profit_loss                                         ,t.normal_investment                                         ,t.normal_refund_investment                                         ,t.already_payout_amount_ap                                         ,t.already_payout_amount_diff                                          --for FO1309,FO1310                                         ,t.is_inplay_bet                                         ,t.channel_type                                         ,t.centre_no                                         ,t.window_no                                         ,t.ticket_request_at                                         ,t.ticket_eos_start_at                                         ,t.ticket_eos                                         ,t.accept_category                                         ,t.is_inplay_cashout                                         ,t.cashout_datetime                                         ,t.cashout_eos_start_at                                         ,t.cashout_eos                                         ,t.event_id                                         ,t.parent_event_id                                         ,t.pool_id                                         ,t.is_aggregated                                         ,@now--t.create_at                                                        ,@now--t.update_at                               FROM                      @cashout_single_ticket_tmp t                WHERE                     t.row_num > @row_num                ORDER BY t.row_num;                SELECT @record_no = @@rowcount;                --delete unsettled cashout ticket                DELETE uct                FROM dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket uct                     INNER JOIN @ticket_batch_tmp a ON a.system_id = uct.system_id AND a.ticket_id = uct.ticket_id;                --single selection(insert to ticket_bet_financial)                --ticket_bet_financial                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_bet_financial                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id                       ,pay_odds                       ,unit_bet                       ,investment                       ,refund                       ,refund_pool                       ,refund_selection                       ,refund_selective                       ,dividend                       ,profit_loss                       ,bet_value_score                       ,race_no                       ,account_no                       ,settle_bizdate                       ,is_cashout                       ,sports_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,event_type                       ,bet_type                       ,allup_level                       ,single_bet_pool_id                       ,single_bet_line_id                       ,single_bet_combination_id                       ,pool_event_id                       ,tag_event_id                       ,is_allup                       ,is_inplay                       ,account_category                       ,channel_device_type                       ,channel_report_type                       ,is_on_course                       ,is_allup_ticket                       ,ticket_allup_level                       ,ticket_allup_type                       ,create_at                       ,update_at)                OUTPUT inserted.system_id                      ,inserted.ticket_id                      ,inserted.bet_id                      ,inserted.dividend                       INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp(system_id                                                 ,ticket_id                                                 ,bet_id                                                 ,cashout_amount)                SELECT b.system_id                      ,b.ticket_id                      ,bet_id                      ,pay_odds                      ,unit_bet                      ,investment                      ,refund                      ,refund_pool                      ,refund_selection                      ,refund_selective                      ,dividend                      ,profit_loss                      ,bet_value_score                      ,race_no                      ,account_no                      ,@bizdate                      ,1 --is_cashout                      ,sports_id                      ,sell_bizdate                      ,event_type                      ,bet_type                      ,allup_level                      ,single_bet_pool_id                      ,single_bet_line_id                      ,single_bet_combination_id                      ,pool_event_id                      ,tag_event_id                      ,is_allup                      ,is_inplay                      ,account_category                      ,channel_device_type                      ,channel_report_type                      ,is_on_course                      ,is_allup_ticket                      ,ticket_allup_level                      ,ticket_allup_type                      ,@now                      ,@now                FROM   @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp b                       INNER JOIN @ticket_batch_tmp t ON b.system_id = t.system_id AND b.ticket_id = t.ticket_id;                --delete unsettled ticket bet                --insert unsettled_cashout_bet_diff_single CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_divcal(    @activity        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg             NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay        DECLARE                @system_id                TINYINT              ,@ticket_id                 BIGINT -- TODO: for checking parent ticket id              ,@divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;        --        -- set parent @ticket_id        INSERT INTO @divcal_new               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,child_ticket_id               ,divcal_amount               ,selective_refund_amount               ,is_divcal_done               ,activity_id)        SELECT bizdate              ,system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,ticket_id              ,divcal_amount              ,selective_refund_amount              ,is_divcal_done              ,activity_id        FROM   @divcal;        --        -- divcal        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal              @divcal_new,             @system_datetime;        --        -- divcal plc for selective refund        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc              @divcal_plc,             @system_datetime;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_summary_snapshot_pool_combinations(@task_id             BIGINT   ,@checkpoint_id       BIGINT   ,@pool_id             BIGINT   ,@return_msg    VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @payout_date            DATE  ,@event_type          TINYINT  ,@result_count            INT  ,@pool_update_at DATETIME2(7)  ,@sports_id           TINYINT;SELECT @payout_date = ISNULL(settle_bizdate,ISNULL(payout_start_bizdate,refund_bizdate))  ,@event_type = event_type  ,@sports_id = sports_id  ,@pool_update_at = update_atFROM   dbo.poolsWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id;SELECT r.pool_id  ,r.line_id  ,r.result_id  ,r.combination_id  ,r.is_payout_refund  ,CAST(IIF(@payout_date IS NULL OR r.result_status = 19 OR r.is_payout = 0,0,r.result_status) AS TINYINT) AS result_status  ,r.pay_factor_1  ,r.pay_factor_2  ,@event_type AS                                                                                             event_type  ,@sports_id AS                                                                                              sports_id  ,IIF(@pool_update_at > r.update_at,@pool_update_at,r.update_at) AS                                          update_atFROM   dbo.pool_combination_result rWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id;SET @result_count = @@rowcount;DECLARE    @now DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2();UPDATE dbo.log_summary_snapshot_taskSET    task_status = IIF(is_today = 1,1,2), -- History data no need to update unsettled_ticket_bet_financialaffected_result_count = @result_count,payout_date = @payout_date,update_at = @nowWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND task_id = @task_id;SET @return_msg = '';END;
