,@activity_idFROM   @tvp_ticket_bet_allup;INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup_combination   (system_id   ,sell_bizdate   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,leg_no   ,leg_order   ,financial_index   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,result_id   ,unit_bet   ,odds   ,ems_sequence   ,event_id   ,settle_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,@sell_bizdate  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,leg_no  ,leg_order  ,financial_index  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,combination_id  ,unit_bet  ,odds  ,ems_sequence  ,event_id  ,0  ,@system_datetime  ,@activity_id  ,@system_datetime  ,@activity_idFROM   @tvp_ticket_bet_allup;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater(@activity      dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request  dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@account         dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@ticket              dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                      DATETIME2   ,@checkpoint_id               BIGINT = 0)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code                  INT = 0  ,@error_message     NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@i_log_bet_type          TINYINT = 1  ,@is_insert_needed            BIT = 0  ,@is_reverse                  BIT  ,@is_cancel_reverse           BIT;DECLARE    @activity_id                    BIGINT  ,@system_id                     TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id                BIGINT  ,@parent_sell_request_id         BIGINT  ,@log_bet_type                  TINYINT  ,@log_bet_category              TINYINT  ,@last_ticket_action            TINYINT  ,@ticket_id                      BIGINT  ,@counter_offer_id               BIGINT  ,@collation_sequence             BIGINT  ,@account_no                VARCHAR(16)  ,@account_category                  INT  ,@centre_no                         INT  ,@channel_type                  TINYINT  ,@window_no                    SMALLINT  ,@is_on_course                      BIT  ,@result_code                       INT  ,@unit_bet               DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@financial_index               TINYINT  ,@flag                          TINYINT  ,@remark                   VARCHAR(250)  ,@reject_code                  SMALLINT  ,@reject_reason            VARCHAR(250)  ,@activity_code                 TINYINT  ,@activity_type                 TINYINT  ,@message_type                  TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status           TINYINT  ,@ticket_status                 TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type            TINYINT  ,@collation_type                TINYINT  ,@bet_intercept_reason          TINYINT  ,@bizdate                          DATE  ,@request_at                  DATETIME2  ,@sports_id                     TINYINT;--SELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id  ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id  ,@counter_offer_id = counter_offer_id  ,@centre_no = centre_no  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@window_no = window_no  ,@is_on_course = is_on_course  ,@unit_bet = unit_bet_updated--unit_bet  ,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = bizdate  ,@request_at = request_at  ,@flag = flag  ,@remark = remark  ,@reject_code = reject_code  ,@reject_reason = reject_reason  ,@sports_id = sports_idFROM   @sell_request;SELECT @activity_code = activity_code  ,@activity_type = activity_type  ,@message_type = message_type  ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status  ,@ticket_status = ticket_status  ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_type  ,@bet_intercept_reason = bet_intercept_reason  ,@collation_sequence = collation_sequence  ,@result_code = result_codeFROM   @activity;SELECT @account_no = account_no  ,@account_category = account_categoryFROM   @account;--SELECT @centre_no = centre_no--FROM   @location;---- Delete log_bet record for sell undo and ticket cancel undo caseSELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_idFROM   @ticket;--SELECT @is_reverse = is_reverse  ,@is_cancel_reverse = is_cancel_reverseFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_statusWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;IF @is_reverse = 1 -- Sell Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 1; -- AcceptEND;IF @is_cancel_reverse = 1 -- Ticket Cancel Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 2 AND log_bet_category = 6; -- Reject, CancelEND;---- check all possible bet_type for each sell_requestWHILE @i_log_bet_type < 4 -- 1 Accept, 2 Reject, 3 Counter OfferBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 0;SET @log_bet_category = 0;-- check @activity_statusIF @i_log_bet_type = 1 -- accept   AND @activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY   AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD   AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3) --REVERSE_CANCELBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;SET @log_bet_category = @counter_offer_type;--SELECT @unit_bet = unit_bet FROM  @ticket;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 2 -- reject   AND @result_code > 0 -- AP indicated reject   AND (@ticket_status <> 5 OR @ticket_status IS NULL) -- null: for request rejected by AP-- AND @checkpoint_id; > 0 -- from RM-- AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL-- AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTEDBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 2xx Customer / Trader / System / Customer Timeout / Trader Timeout--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @sell_request_status = 8; -- Customer?SELECT @log_bet_category = 3; -- defaultSELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @sell_request_status = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3--WHERE  @sell_request_status = 9;SELECT @log_bet_category = 4WHERE  @sell_request_status = 7;SELECT @log_bet_category = 5WHERE  @sell_request_status = 6;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 3 -- counter offer   AND @sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED   AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFERBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 3xx Trader / SystemMNL / SystemOdds--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @counter_offer_type = 3;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 2 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 7;-- 3xx System / Trader: after FR_4613 simplification on 2020-05-06SELECT @log_bet_category = 1WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(1,2);SELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(3);END;--IF @is_insert_needed = 1 -- insert accept / reject / counter offer   AND NOT(@is_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 1) -- Sell Undo already, no need to insert Accept record   AND NOT(@is_cancel_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6) -- Cancel Undo already, no need to insert Reject Cancel recordBEGIN-- special handling for ticket cancelIF @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6 -- Reject, CancelBEGINSELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id   --,@centre_no = centre_no  --,@unit_bet = unit_bet   --,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = sell_bizdate  ,@request_at = sell_datetime--,@flag = flag--,@remark = remark--,@reject_code = reject_code--,@reject_reason = reject_reasonFROM   @ticket;END;--SET @log_bet_type = @i_log_bet_type;INSERT INTO dbo.log_bet   (activity_id   ,system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,log_bet_type   ,log_bet_category   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,collation_sequence   ,account_no   ,account_category   ,channel_type   ,window_no   ,is_on_course   ,centre_no   ,unit_bet   ,financial_index   ,flag   ,remark   ,reject_code   ,reject_reason   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,checkpoint_id   ,activity_bizdate   ,activity_at   ,create_at   ,update_at)VALUES   (@activity_id   ,@system_id   ,@sell_request_id   ,@parent_sell_request_id   ,@log_bet_type   ,@log_bet_category   ,@ticket_id   ,@sports_id   ,@counter_offer_id   ,@collation_sequence   ,@account_no   ,@account_category   ,@channel_type   ,@window_no   ,@is_on_course   ,@centre_no   ,@unit_bet   ,@financial_index   ,@flag   ,@remark   ,@reject_code   ,@reject_reason   ,@activity_code   ,@activity_type   ,@message_type   ,@sell_request_status   ,@ticket_status   ,@counter_offer_type   ,@collation_type   ,@bet_intercept_reason   ,@checkpoint_id   ,@bizdate   ,@request_at   ,@now   ,@now);END;SET @i_log_bet_type+=1;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_location(    @location dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@now                DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_location           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,activity_id           ,process_location           ,centre_no           ,window_no           ,is_svt           ,is_on_course           ,esc_no           ,terminal_no           ,ngbt_bet_mode           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.activity_id          ,a.process_location          ,a.centre_no          ,a.window_no          ,a.is_svt          ,a.is_on_course          ,a.esc_no          ,a.terminal_no          ,a.ngbt_bet_mode          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @location a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_location srl WITH (FORCESEEK) ON srl.system_id = a.system_id AND srl.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.sell_request_id > 0 AND srl.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_account(    @account dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_account           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,account_no           ,account_transaction_no           ,account_category_id           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.account_no          ,a.account_transaction_no          ,a.account_category          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @account a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_account sra WITH(FORCESEEK) ON sra.system_id = a.system_id AND sra.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.account_no IS NOT NULL AND a.account_no <> '' AND sra.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater(@sell_request     dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg          dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@now                         DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0;DECLARE    @bizdate                DATE  ,@channel_type        TINYINT  ,@channel_device_type TINYINT  ,@channel_report_type TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT  ,@db_activity_id       BIGINT = 0  ,@db_exists               BIT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id      BIGINT;SELECT @bizdate = bizdate  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@channel_device_type = channel_device_type  ,@channel_report_type = channel_report_type  ,@activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_idFROM   @sell_request;IF @@rowcount = 0BEGINRETURN; -- sell_request record not found, skipEND;-- get db activity_idSELECT @db_activity_id = update_activity_id  ,@db_exists = 1FROM   dbo.sell_request WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE  @system_id = system_id AND @sell_request_id = sell_request_idORDER BY update_activity_id DESC;-- skip update if db record is newerIF @db_activity_id >= @activity_idBEGINRETURN;END;IF @db_exists = 1BEGINUPDATE dbsrSET    dbsr.parent_sell_request_id = sr.parent_sell_request_id,dbsr.ticket_id = sr.ticket_id,dbsr.unit_bet_updated = sr.unit_bet_updated,dbsr.investment_updated = sr.investment_updated,dbsr.tsn = sr.tsn,dbsr.rtsn = sr.rtsn,dbsr.bet_line = sr.bet_line,dbsr.update_at = @now,dbsr.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request dbsr WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @sell_request sr ON dbsr.system_id = sr.system_id AND dbsr.sell_request_id = sr.sell_request_id;UPDATE dbsrlSET    dbsrl.odds_counter_offered = srl.odds_counter_offered,dbsrl.update_at = @now,dbsrl.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request_leg dbsrl WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @leg srl ON dbsrl.system_id = srl.system_id AND dbsrl.sell_request_id = srl.sell_request_id AND dbsrl.pool_id = srl.pool_id AND dbsrl.line_id = srl.line_id AND dbsrl.combination_id = srl.combination_id;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.sell_request   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,odds_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_level   ,allup_formula   ,allup_type   ,bizdate   ,request_at   ,location_type   ,channel_type   ,channel_device_type   ,channel_report_type   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,financial_index   ,num_bet   ,unit_bet   ,unit_bet_updated   ,investment   ,investment_updated   ,tsn   ,rtsn   ,bet_line   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,race_no   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,parent_sell_request_id  ,ticket_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,odds_type  ,is_allup  ,allup_level  ,allup_formula  ,allup_type  ,@bizdate  ,request_at  ,location_type  ,channel_type  ,channel_device_type  ,channel_report_type  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,financial_index  ,num_bet  ,unit_bet  ,unit_bet_updated  ,investment  ,investment_updated  ,tsn  ,rtsn  ,bet_line  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,race_no  ,@now  ,activity_id  ,@now  ,activity_idFROM   @sell_request;INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_leg   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,bizdate   ,sports_id   ,leg_order   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,combination_order   ,is_inplay   ,odds   ,odds_counter_offered   ,ems_sequence   ,event_id   ,event_operation_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,dbo.udf_get_bizdate()  ,sports_id  ,leg_order  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,combination_order  ,is_inplay  ,odds  ,odds_counter_offered  ,ems_sequence  ,event_id  ,event_operation_status  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @leg;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update(    @tvp_ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@count                   INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_id            TINYINT          ,@ticket_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_id           BIGINT          ,@activity_bizdate        DATE          ,@activity_at        DATETIME2          ,@ticket_status        TINYINT          ,@last_ticket_status   TINYINT          ,@sell_activity_id      BIGINT          ,@sell_bizdate            DATE          ,@sell_at            DATETIME2          ,@pay_activity_id       BIGINT          ,@pay_bizdate             DATE          ,@pay_at             DATETIME2          ,@cancel_activity_id    BIGINT          ,@cancel_bizdate          DATE          ,@cancel_at          DATETIME2          ,@is_reverse               BIT          ,@is_pay                   BIT          ,@is_cancel                BIT          ,@is_cancel_reverse        BIT          ,@last_ticket_action   TINYINT          ,@last_activity_id      BIGINT;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@activity_bizdate = activity_bizdate          ,@activity_at = activity_at          ,@ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    IF @@rowcount <> 1    BEGIN        SELECT @error_code = 50001              ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';        THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;    END;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history_mem           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND activity_id > @activity_id    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;    IF @@rowcount = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @ticket_status = @last_ticket_status;    END;    -- determine the sell_activity_id    IF @ticket_action = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @count = COUNT(*)        FROM   dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND ticket_action = 2;        IF @count = 0        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = @activity_id                  ,@sell_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                  ,@sell_at = @activity_at                  ,@is_reverse = 0;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 2        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4            BEGIN                SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                            ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 3 OR ticket_action = 4)                ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                -- Payout is the last one                IF @last_ticket_action = 3                BEGIN                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = @last_activity_id                          ,@pay_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                          ,@pay_at = @activity_at                          ,@is_pay = 1;                END;                    ELSE                BEGIN -- UNDO is the last one                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = NULL                          ,@pay_bizdate = NULL                          ,@pay_at = NULL                          ,@is_pay = 0;                END;            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6                BEGIN                    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                                ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 5 OR ticket_action = 6)                    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                    IF @last_ticket_action = 5                    BEGIN                        -- Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = @last_activity_id                              ,@cancel_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                              ,@cancel_at = @activity_at                              ,@is_cancel = 1                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 0;                    END;                        ELSE                    BEGIN                        -- UNDO Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = NULL                              ,@cancel_bizdate = NULL                              ,@cancel_at = NULL                              ,@is_cancel = 0                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 1;                    END;                END;            END;        END;    END;    IF @ticket_action = 1 OR @ticket_action = 2    BEGIN        UPDATE dbo.ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;--unsettled ticket status UPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4        BEGIN            UPDATE dbo.ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6            BEGIN                UPDATE dbo.ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;            END;        END;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert(@tvp_ticket_account dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@system_datetime             DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_account   (system_id   ,sell_bizdate   ,ticket_id   ,account_no   ,account_transaction_no   ,account_category   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_bizdate  ,ticket_id  ,account_no  ,account_transaction_no  ,account_category  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_id  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_idFROM   @tvp_ticket_account;END;

(@P0 bigint,@P1 nvarchar(4000),@P2 nvarchar(4000),@P3 nvarchar(4000),@P4 nvarchar(4000))SELECTCASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0THEN CAST(1 AS BIT)ELSE CAST(0 AS BIT)ENDFROM event_records erINNER JOIN event_profile_level2s ep ON er.event2_event_id = ep.node_idINNER JOIN nodes n WITH (NOLOCK) ON ep.node_id = n.idWHEREer.id =  @P0 AND er.event_profile_created = 1AND er.event_profile_deleted = 0AND n.deleted = 0 AND ep.event_operation_status IN (   @P1  ,  @P2  ,  @P3  ,  @P4  )
